switchingPerspectivesDescription: In multihanded solo, you’ll sometimes need to act from a specific investigator’s point of view. Use the eye icon in the player tabs to switch to that investigator’s perspective.
standalone: 冒险模式(使用剧本关卡)
alphaWarning: 此剧本目前正在开发中。它可能尚未完成，您不应该针对它提交bug报告。
betaWarning: 此剧本已准备就绪供测试使用，但请做好游戏频繁崩溃的心理准备。
betaWarningScenario: This scenario is ready for testing but expect your games to break frequently.

PlayersDoNotControlStoryAssetClues.title: Players Do Not Control Story Asset Clues
PlayersDoNotControlStoryAssetClues.description: Since The Feast of Hemlock Vale players now control clues on assets they control, this has some weird interactions in this campaign so it is recommended to enable this option to exclude story assets from that rule.
